programme.title: Wild Patagonia
programme.desc: The rarely seen Patagonian wilderness; the secret lives of pumas and hummingbirds; glacial peaks and monkey puzzle forests; extreme kayakers ride raging waterfalls; Patagonia's cowboys round up wild horses.

programme.title: Wild Patagonia
programme.desc: Follows the path of a relentless wind from the Andes' peaks, that sweeps east through Patagonia's dry desert; the world of maras and desert-dwelling penguins; the first faltering steps of baby guanacos.

programme.title: Wild Patagonia
programme.desc: This is the story of an awe-inspiring coastline, 4000 miles long. From the cold, fearsome waters of Cabo de Hornos to the far north, with huge elephant seals battling for position in the heat of the desert.

programme.title: Weird Science
programme.desc: Gary and Wyatt design their ideal woman on a computer, and a freak electrical accident brings her to life in the form of the lovely, superhuman Lisa.

programme.title: Red Dawn
programme.desc: Colorado teens (Patrick Swayze, C. Thomas Howell, Lea Thompson) fight back after Soviet-led paratroops drop into town for World War III.

programme.title: Highlander
programme.desc: A New Yorker (Christopher Lambert) beheads a swordsman in a parking lot, continuing a battle of immortals.

programme.title: Spaceballs
programme.desc: President Skroob (Mel Brooks) pits evil Dark Helmet (Rick Moranis) against Lone Starr and the half-man, half-dog Barf (John Candy).

programme.title: Crocodile Dundee
programme.desc: A rich reporter tours outback Australia with a crocodile hunter, then brings him to Manhattan.

programme.title: Crocodile Dundee II
programme.desc: Colombian drug dealers pursue the outback he-man (Paul Hogan) and his Manhattan girlfriend (Linda Kozlowski) in Australia.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.desc: The BAU heads to upstate New York to investigate mysterious disappearances; Prentiss receives troubling news about a former colleague.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.desc: Reid's ability to connect with an autistic child may prove helpful in finding the boy's missing parents; two former colleagues help Prentiss search for an old adversary.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.desc: After a series of murders, Prentiss becomes suspicious of a former nemesis (Sebastian Roché) and fears for the safety of her team.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.desc: Prentiss prepares to confront her nemesis at last; the team asks J.J. to help find Prentiss and capture Doyle.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.desc: The team must stop a gang of suspected murderers that is targeting a new victim nightly.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.desc: The team must investigate targeted killings in Florida while each member is dealing with feelings about losing Prentiss.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.desc: A stalker in San Diego targets college students; Strauss scrutinizes the team after the loss of Prentiss.

programme.title: The Wild Sides
programme.desc: The landscape transforms as the rains finally fall, bringing in various changes for the wildlife.

programme.title: Planet Earth
programme.desc: New science about the dynamics of emperor penguin behavior and aerial images of a polar bear swimming.

programme.title: Planet Earth II
programme.desc: The hostile conditions of Earth's desert regions give rise to the most incredible survival stories on Earth.

programme.title: Planet Earth II
programme.desc: The secretive lives of mountain animals; snow leopards come together to help a mother and cub, trapped between rival males.

programme.title: Planet Earth II
programme.desc: Cities serve as places of surprising opportunity for animals to thrive.

programme.title: Planet Earth III
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough reveals new animal behaviors in the ocean.

programme.title: Tommy Boy
programme.desc: A ne'er-do-well auto-parts heir must stop his father's widow from selling the business.

programme.title: Crocodile Dundee
programme.desc: A rich reporter tours outback Australia with a crocodile hunter, then brings him to Manhattan.

programme.title: Crocodile Dundee II
programme.desc: Colombian drug dealers pursue the outback he-man (Paul Hogan) and his Manhattan girlfriend (Linda Kozlowski) in Australia.

programme.title: The Princess Bride
programme.desc: A storybook stable boy turns pirate and rescues his beloved, who is about to marry a dreadful prince.

programme.title: A Knight's Tale
programme.desc: An English commoner (Heath Ledger) dons the armor of a dead jouster and, with the help of friends (Mark Addy, Paul Bettany, Alan Tudyk), competes against nobles in 14th-century France.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A message in blood left by a murdered officer leads NCIS to a manuscript that may contain classified information.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Special Agent Barrett investigates a death she believes is connected to a series of murders; Ziva introduces her boyfriend to the team.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A Navy lieutenant's murder is caught on tape by a Pentagon security camera; Gibbs reveals that Agent Barrett and her team will take over a case involving a serial killer.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Tony revisits his days as a detective in Baltimore after learning that his former partner is likely the latest victim of the port-to-port killer.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: After receiving new evidence that the Port-to-Port killer has infiltrated the agency, the team races to track him down.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The lives of the team members are in danger when they discover the identity of the Port-to-Port killer.

programme.title: FOX and Friends
programme.desc: Co-hosts Steve Doocy, Ainsley Earhardt, Brian Kilmeade and Lawrence Jones highlight the latest.

programme.title: FOX and Friends
programme.desc: Co-hosts Steve Doocy, Ainsley Earhardt, Brian Kilmeade and Lawrence Jones highlight the latest.

programme.title: FOX and Friends
programme.desc: Co-hosts Steve Doocy, Ainsley Earhardt, Brian Kilmeade and Lawrence Jones highlight the latest.

programme.title: America's Newsroom
programme.desc: Bill Hemmer and Dana Perino cover current events happening around the nation and the world; guests pertinent to the news topics are interviewed, and viewer emails are also answered by the anchors and guests.

programme.title: America's Newsroom
programme.desc: Bill Hemmer and Dana Perino cover current events happening around the nation and the world; guests pertinent to the news topics are interviewed, and viewer emails are also answered by the anchors and guests.

programme.title: The Faulkner Focus
programme.desc: Emmy-winning journalist Harris Faulkner provides the latest news with insightful analysis and interviews with top newsmakers.

programme.title: Outnumbered
programme.desc: Four female panelists and one male colleague share their perspectives on the day's top news stories.

programme.title: America Reports
programme.desc: A look at the latest news and headlines with Sandra Smith and John Roberts.

programme.title: America Reports
programme.desc: A look at the latest news and headlines with Sandra Smith and John Roberts.

programme.title: The Story With Martha MacCallum
programme.desc: Martha MacCallum brings the story of the times with her tough but fair interviews and straightforward analysis;

programme.title: The Will Cain Show
programme.desc: Featuring Cain's signature podcast style and thoughtful perspective through conversations with newsmakers across politics, culture and sports.

programme.title: The Five
programme.desc: Dana Perino, Greg Gutfeld and Jesse Watters and rotating liberal co-hosts Jessica Tarlov and Harold Ford Jr. discuss and debate the hot issues across the spectrum from politics to pop culture.

programme.title: Special Report With Bret Baier
programme.desc: Former Fox News chief White House correspondent Bret Baier takes a closer look at political stories from Washington, DC.

programme.title: The Ingraham Angle
programme.desc: Laura Ingraham aims to cut through the Washington chatter to speak directly with unexpected voices and the actual people who are impacted by the news of the day.

programme.title: Jesse Watters Primetime
programme.desc: Jesse Watters speaks with newsmakers from across the U.S. to present news with a clear and direct approach.

programme.title: Hannity
programme.desc: Sean Hannity interviews political figures and newsmakers and offers his own conservative perspective on events.

programme.title: Gutfeld!
programme.desc: Greg Gutfeld looks at the news of the day through a satiric lens fused with pop culture and features his takes on the day's headlines.

programme.title: Fox News at Night
programme.desc: Hard news and analysis of compelling stories from DC and across the country; journalists provide viewers with must-see information and consequential news.

programme.title: The Five
programme.desc: Dana Perino, Greg Gutfeld and Jesse Watters and rotating liberal co-hosts Jessica Tarlov and Harold Ford Jr. discuss and debate the hot issues across the spectrum from politics to pop culture.

programme.title: Jesse Watters Primetime
programme.desc: Jesse Watters speaks with newsmakers from across the U.S. to present news with a clear and direct approach.

programme.desc: Hard news and analysis of compelling stories from DC and across the country; journalists provide viewers with must-see information and consequential news.

programme.title: FOX & Friends First
programme.desc: Hosts Todd Piro and Carley Shimkus present all the headlines viewers may have missed overnight, along with a preview of upcoming news events.

programme.title: Covert Cash: What American Universities Don't Want You to Know About Their Foreign Funding
programme.desc: Exposes the billions of dollars flowing into U.S. universities from countries hostile to American values and democracy.

programme.title: The Freedom File: Judge Napolitano
programme.desc: Judge Napolitano provides commentary on current events, drawing on his expertise in constitutional law to protect individual freedoms.

programme.title: First Edition
programme.desc: The host presents a round-up of the latest social, political and economic news updates and developments from across the country.

programme.title: News Now
programme.desc: Host Shannon Cake brings you live reporting, global field updates and insight-rich interviews shaping the day's high-stakes stories.

programme.title: National Update
programme.desc: Live national headlines, expert interviews and insight into the stories shaping America.

programme.title: John Bachman Now
programme.desc: John Bachman tackles big news from DC, NY and around America.

programme.title: National Desk
programme.desc: Bringing breaking news, investigative reports, and political coverage.

programme.title: Newswire
programme.desc: Up-to-the-minute news updates, in-depth analysis, exclusive interviews and a fresh perspective on the day's top stories and key developments in breaking news, politics and current events.

programme.title: Ike Wingate America
programme.desc: Ike Wingate is a straight shooter who takes the complex stories of the day and lays them out logically and sensibly, making sense of the news.

programme.title: The Todd Starnes Show
programme.desc: Todd Starnes delivers breaking news and commentary covering politics, faith, and culture.

programme.title: Ed Henry: The Briefing
programme.desc: A comprehensive update, offering a dynamic blend of breaking news, political developments and business insights.

programme.title: The Leventhal Report
programme.desc: Rick Leventhal delivers comprehensive analysis and interviews on current affairs and significant events from home and abroad.

programme.title: David Harris Jr. The Pulse
programme.desc: Hard-hitting analysis and opinion on the latest news and events delivered.

programme.title: America's Mayor Live
programme.desc: Former NY Mayor Rudy Giuliani gives insight on leadership, courage and the most pressing issues of our time.

programme.title: Stand Up Trump: Making America Fun Again
programme.desc: Unlike any president who has come before him, Donald J. Trump is a commander-in-chief who doesn't just go off-script, sometimes he just goes off.

programme.title: Greg Kelly This Week
programme.desc: Greg Kelly provides hard-hitting reports and analysis from Los Angeles to New York and the Beltway to the Rust Belt.

programme.title: Ed Henry: The Briefing
programme.desc: A comprehensive update, offering a dynamic blend of breaking news, political developments and business insights.

programme.title: The Leventhal Report
programme.desc: Rick Leventhal delivers comprehensive analysis and interviews on current affairs and significant events from home and abroad.

programme.title: David Harris Jr. The Pulse
programme.desc: Hard-hitting analysis and opinion on the latest news and events delivered.

programme.title: Manufacturing Death: Birth of the Atom Bomb
programme.desc: A look at how the birth of the atomic bomb changed the world by bringing an end to the largest conflict in history and ushering in an atomic age and a defining era of big science.

programme.title: The Nazi War Machine of WWII
programme.desc: A comprehensive look at the Panzer Corps, the Luftwaffe, and the S.S.

programme.title: The Nazi War Machine of WWII
programme.desc: The German's Blitzkrieg warfare overwhelms Luxembourg, The Netherlands and Belgium; see how the Nazi's continued their offensive by advancing on Paris.

programme.title: Felix Kersten: Satan's Doctor
programme.desc: The relationship between Dr. Felix Kersten and Heinrich Himmler, head of the SS under Adolf Hitler.

programme.title: Shame of a Nation
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the events of Jan. 6, 2021, protesters were targeted by the Department of Justice for special prosecutions.

programme.title: David Harris Jr. The Pulse
programme.desc: Hard-hitting analysis and opinion on the latest news and events delivered.

programme.title: Mossad
programme.desc: Finding and killing the enemies of Israel is the objective of Mossad's special Kidon unit; the elite agents from the secret division work strictly for Israel's prime minister; what are their assassination techniques?

programme.title: Faithkeepers
programme.desc: Christians, Bahá'í, Yazidis, Jews, and other minority refugees give testimony on their persecution in the Middle East.

programme.title: Josef Mengele: Hunting a Nazi Criminal
programme.desc: He was one of the most notorious Nazi war criminals, infamous for his deadly experiments on twins. But at the end of WWII, he simply disappeared. Despite a global manhunt by Mossad and the allies, he would die a free man, 34 years later, in Brazil.

programme.title: The Hitler Home Movies
programme.desc: Secluded deep in the Bavarian Alps, Hitler, his family and closest allies hid away, issuing orders for armies across Europe while they relaxed, dined and enjoyed an otherworldly peace.

programme.title: Wake Up America Early
programme.desc: Presents news delivering key facts, expert insights, and in-depth analysis to kickstart your day.

programme.title: Wake Up America
programme.desc: Starting the day with real news and analysis.

programme.title: National Report
programme.desc: Your source for up-to-the-minute breaking news; the ideal way to stay informed with eye-opening coverage that makes sense of the stories that affect our lives every day.

programme.desc: Bianca de la Garza tackles the big news from D.C., N.Y., across America, and around the world!

programme.title: Caught on Bodycam
programme.desc: Civilians clash with law enforcement. From shocking confrontations to moments that escalate in an instant, see the consequences when interactions turn physical.

programme.title: Caught on Bodycam
programme.desc: Through the eyes of firefighters and first responders -an intense, unfiltered look at life-threatening emergencies, where every decision counts, and courage is tested to the limit.

programme.title: Bolling!
programme.desc: RAV host Eric Bolling hosts weekdays for an honest, unfiltered take on the issues shaping America's future.

programme.title: Daybreak
programme.desc: Join hosts Steve and Ivie Gruber as they get your day started.

programme.title: American Sunrise
programme.desc: Morning news with the Real America's Voice team live from West Palm Beach, Florida.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, a Christian minister, discusses religious teachings and encourages people to live ethically.

programme.title: Andrew Wommack: Gospel Truth
programme.desc: Andrew shares life-changing lessons we can learn from the life of David and how God looks at the heart of men.

programme.title: Turning Point With Dr. David Jeremiah
programme.desc: The secret to continual joy is found in Christ.

programme.title: Joseph Prince
programme.desc: Come discover the secret to success without striving: God's unmerited favor!

programme.title: Robert Jeffress
programme.desc: Most people think that the surest way to achieve success is by being aggressive, getting noticed and climbing up the ranks, but the truth is just the opposite; a counterintuitive lesson about pride and humility.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, a Christian minister, discusses religious teachings and encourages people to live ethically.

programme.title: Creflo Dollar
programme.desc: Being in sync with one's identity in Christ.

programme.title: Hagee Ministries
programme.desc: The mission of John Hagee Ministries is to take the Gospel to all the world and to all generations.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Joel and Victoria Osteen's message of unconditional love and unending hope reaches everyone across the world.

programme.title: Allen Jackson Ministries
programme.desc: What's the best way to prepare for the uncertain future? Trust God with our resources! Pastor Allen Jackson talks about biblical principles surrounding the money, resources, and possessions.

programme.title: Steven Furtick
programme.desc: Pastor Steven Furtick teaches how God can turn one's greatest weakness into His greatest weapon.

programme.title: Kingdom Connection With Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: A mission to share the profound truths of God's Word; with each episode, viewers are inspired by Franklin Jentezen's words, which echo the timeless wisdom of the scriptures.

programme.title: Robert Jeffress
programme.desc: Pathway to Victory is the broadcast ministry of Dr. Robert Jeffress and the First Baptist Church of Dallas, Texas. The bold and practical Bible teaching of Pastor Jeffress pierces the darkness with the light of God's Word.

programme.title: Winning Walk
programme.desc: The international teaching ministry of the Rev. Dr. Ed Young, senior pastor of Second Baptist Church in Houston, proclaims the truth of God's word to people throughout the world.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, a Christian minister, discusses religious teachings and encourages people to live ethically.

programme.title: Better Together
programme.desc: Better Together is an original faith-centered talk show produced by women and just for women.

programme.title: Andrew Wommack: Gospel Truth
programme.desc: Andrew shares life-changing lessons we can learn from the life of David and how God looks at the heart of men.

programme.title: The 700 Club
programme.desc: Inspiring stories of miracles and answered prayers from around the world.

programme.title: Turning Point With Dr. David Jeremiah
programme.desc: The secret to continual joy is found in Christ.

programme.title: Steven Furtick
programme.desc: Pastor Steven Furtick teaches how God can turn one's greatest weakness into His greatest weapon.

programme.title: Harvest With Pastor Greg Laurie
programme.desc: Join Pastor Greg Laurie for a time of encouragement, worship and Bible study.

programme.desc: Join Charlie Kirk as he breaks down the news, challenges the mainstream narrative and delivers commentary on faith, culture and politics; no spin, no censorship, just the truth.

programme.title: Allen Jackson NOW
programme.desc: A lifeline for a struggling and anxious nation; a guiding hand for those who are not ready to give up, and for those who want to find a way past the negativity before things get worse; searching for the wisdom embedded in a Christian World View.

programme.title: Stakelbeck Tonight
programme.desc: Host Erick Stakelbeck takes viewers around the world; from Jerusalem to London to Washington, D.C., pointing beyond with cutting-edge commentary, analysis and interviews focusing on ever-changing events and why they matter.

programme.title: The Rosenberg Report
programme.desc: Joel C. Rosenberg is a respected geopolitical expert on the Middle East. Each week, he offers a close-up view of current events and issues in this volatile region, bringing important insights and biblical perspective.
